topic.what: Automated detection of inconsistencies between Google Play Data Safety Sections and Privacy Policies
topic.how: Multi-prompt LLM-based pipeline with 4 stages: scraping, pre-processing, analysis, post-processing
topic.why_matters: Nearly 80% of apps have incomplete/misleading DSS declarations; addresses compliance with GDPR and app store policies

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of detected omissions that are true positives
characteristics.evidence: Manual validation on 10% stratified subset across 3 runs
characteristics.context: Average across 3 independent runs on set_medium

requires: manual validation for false positive filtering

novelty: First LLM-based pipeline for PP-DSS consistency auditing at scale
Multi-prompt 4-stage methodology with pre-processing and post-processing
Open-source tool and dataset release for reproducibility
open_problems: Support for Apple Privacy Labels and other platforms
Extension to app behavior analysis beyond documentation
Mitigation of LLM non-determinism for production deployment
Addressing apps with shared privacy policies across multiple products
